description: Tredict is an endurance sports training and activity-analysis platform for athletes and coaches. It stores training activities, planned workouts, and health metrics, and integrates with connected fitness devices and services.
summary: Tredict exposes a bearer-authenticated REST API at `https://www.tredict.com/api/oauth/v2/` plus an OAuth-capable MCP server at `https://www.tredict.com/api/mcp/v2/`; no public GraphQL API or CLI surfaced.
